label: res.partner

website_url.name: website_url
website_url.help_text: The full URL to access the document through the website.

message_needaction.name: message_needaction
message_needaction.help_text: If checked, new messages require your attention.

message_has_error.name: message_has_error
message_has_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

message_has_error_counter.name: message_has_error_counter
message_has_error_counter.help_text: Number of messages with delivery error

message_has_sms_error.name: message_has_sms_error
message_has_sms_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

email_normalized.name: email_normalized
email_normalized.help_text: This field is used to search on email address as the primary email field can contain more than strictly an email address.

is_blacklisted.name: is_blacklisted
is_blacklisted.help_text: If the email address is on the blacklist, the contact won't receive mass mailing anymore, from any list

message_bounce.name: message_bounce
message_bounce.help_text: Counter of the number of bounced emails for this contact

activity_state.name: activity_state
activity_state.help_text:
Status based on activities
Overdue: Due date is already passed
Today: Activity date is today
Planned: Future activities.

activity_exception_decoration.name: activity_exception_decoration
activity_exception_decoration.help_text: Type of the exception activity on record.

activity_exception_icon.name: activity_exception_icon
activity_exception_icon.help_text: Icon to indicate an exception activity.

lang.name: lang
lang.help_text: All the emails and documents sent to this contact will be translated in this language.

tz.name: tz
tz.help_text:
When printing documents and exporting/importing data, time values are computed according to this timezone.
If the timezone is not set, UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) is used.
Anywhere else, time values are computed according to the time offset of your web client.

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.help_text: The internal user in charge of this contact.

vat.name: vat
vat.help_text: The Tax Identification Number. Values here will be validated based on the country format. You can use '/' to indicate that the partner is not subject to tax.

company_registry.name: company_registry
company_registry.help_text: The registry number of the company. Use it if it is different from the Tax ID. It must be unique across all partners of a same country

employee.name: employee
employee.help_text: Check this box if this contact is an Employee.

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.help_text:
The ISO country code in two chars. 
You can use this field for quick search.

is_company.name: is_company
is_company.help_text: Check if the contact is a company, otherwise it is a person

partner_share.name: partner_share
partner_share.help_text: Either customer (not a user), either shared user. Indicated the current partner is a customer without access or with a limited access created for sharing data.

barcode.name: barcode
barcode.help_text: Use a barcode to identify this contact.

calendar_last_notif_ack.name: calendar_last_notif_ack
calendar_last_notif_ack.string: Last notification marked as read from base Calendar

property_product_pricelist.name: property_product_pricelist
property_product_pricelist.help_text: This pricelist will be used, instead of the default one, for sales to the current partner

country_enforce_cities.name: country_enforce_cities
country_enforce_cities.help_text: Check this box to ensure every address created in that country has a 'City' chosen in the list of the country's cities.

ocn_token.name: ocn_token
ocn_token.help_text: Used for sending notification to registered devices

phone_sanitized.name: phone_sanitized
phone_sanitized.help_text: Field used to store sanitized phone number. Helps speeding up searches and comparisons.

phone_sanitized_blacklisted.name: phone_sanitized_blacklisted
phone_sanitized_blacklisted.help_text: If the sanitized phone number is on the blacklist, the contact won't receive mass mailing sms anymore, from any list

phone_blacklisted.name: phone_blacklisted
phone_blacklisted.help_text: Indicates if a blacklisted sanitized phone number is a phone number. Helps distinguish which number is blacklisted             when there is both a mobile and phone field in a model.

mobile_blacklisted.name: mobile_blacklisted
mobile_blacklisted.help_text: Indicates if a blacklisted sanitized phone number is a mobile number. Helps distinguish which number is blacklisted             when there is both a mobile and phone field in a model.

credit.name: credit
credit.help_text: Total amount this customer owes you.

credit_limit.name: credit_limit
credit_limit.help_text: Credit limit specific to this partner.

use_partner_credit_limit.name: use_partner_credit_limit
use_partner_credit_limit.help_text: Set a value greater than 0.0 to activate a credit limit check

days_sales_outstanding.name: days_sales_outstanding
days_sales_outstanding.help_text: [(Total Receivable/Total Revenue) * number of days since the first invoice] for this customer

debit.name: debit
debit.help_text: Total amount you have to pay to this vendor.

property_account_payable_id.name: property_account_payable_id
property_account_payable_id.help_text: This account will be used instead of the default one as the payable account for the current partner

property_account_receivable_id.name: property_account_receivable_id
property_account_receivable_id.help_text: This account will be used instead of the default one as the receivable account for the current partner

property_account_position_id.name: property_account_position_id
property_account_position_id.help_text: The fiscal position determines the taxes/accounts used for this contact.

property_payment_term_id.name: property_payment_term_id
property_payment_term_id.help_text: This payment term will be used instead of the default one for sales orders and customer invoices

property_supplier_payment_term_id.name: property_supplier_payment_term_id
property_supplier_payment_term_id.help_text: This payment term will be used instead of the default one for purchase orders and vendor bills

trust.name: trust
trust.string: Degree of trust you have in this debtor

invoice_warn.name: invoice_warn
invoice_warn.help_text: Selecting the "Warning" option will notify user with the message, Selecting "Blocking Message" will throw an exception with the message and block the flow. The Message has to be written in the next field.

autopost_bills.name: autopost_bills
autopost_bills.help_text: Automatically post bills for this trusted partner

property_outbound_payment_method_line_id.name: property_outbound_payment_method_line_id
property_outbound_payment_method_line_id.help_text: Preferred payment method when buying from this vendor. This will be set by default on all outgoing payments created for this vendor

property_inbound_payment_method_line_id.name: property_inbound_payment_method_line_id
property_inbound_payment_method_line_id.help_text: Preferred payment method when selling to this customer. This will be set by default on all incoming payments created for this customer

employee_ids.name: employee_ids
employee_ids.help_text: Related employees based on their private address

peppol_endpoint.name: peppol_endpoint
peppol_endpoint.help_text: Unique identifier used by the BIS Billing 3.0 and its derivatives, also known as 'Endpoint ID'.

peppol_eas.name: peppol_eas
peppol_eas.help_text:
Code used to identify the Endpoint for BIS Billing 3.0 and its derivatives.
             List available at https://docs.peppol.eu/poacc/billing/3.0/codelist/eas/

vies_valid.name: vies_valid
vies_valid.help_text: European VAT numbers are automatically checked on the VIES database.

property_purchase_currency_id.name: property_purchase_currency_id
property_purchase_currency_id.help_text: This currency will be used, instead of the default one, for purchases from the current partner

purchase_warn.name: purchase_warn
purchase_warn.help_text: Selecting the "Warning" option will notify user with the message, Selecting "Blocking Message" will throw an exception with the message and block the flow. The Message has to be written in the next field.

receipt_reminder_email.name: receipt_reminder_email
receipt_reminder_email.help_text: Automatically send a confirmation email to the vendor X days before the expected receipt date, asking him to confirm the exact date.

reminder_date_before_receipt.name: reminder_date_before_receipt
reminder_date_before_receipt.help_text: Number of days to send reminder email before the promised receipt date

box_1099_id.name: box_1099_id
box_1099_id.help_text: Journal items of this vendor will be summed in the selected box of the 1099 report.

sale_warn.name: sale_warn
sale_warn.help_text: Selecting the "Warning" option will notify user with the message, Selecting "Blocking Message" will throw an exception with the message and block the flow. The Message has to be written in the next field.

eori_nr.name: eori_nr
eori_nr.help_text: Economic Operators Registration and Identification Nr

workflow_hints: - - **Sub-records**: After creating the parent record, create sub-records via the sub-model fields: invoice_ids. Always preview the parent first, then create sub-records in a second step.
